summary: Completed testing of per-client payment terms feature for Konekt B2B Business OS. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Customers page, Quotes page with customer lookup, and Invoices page all working correctly. Payment terms flow: Customer profile -> Quote -> Invoice -> PDF with auto-calculated due dates.

customer_crud_api.POST /api/admin/customers: PASS - Creates customer with payment terms (Net 7/14/30, due_on_receipt, etc.)
customer_crud_api.GET /api/admin/customers: PASS - Lists customers with search/filter support
customer_crud_api.GET /api/admin/customers/{id}: PASS - Returns specific customer by ID
customer_crud_api.GET /api/admin/customers/by-email/{email: PASS - Returns customer by email for quote/invoice lookup
customer_crud_api.PATCH /api/admin/customers/{id}: PASS - Updates payment terms and other fields correctly

payment_terms_flow.quote_inherits_terms: PASS - Quote auto-applies customer's payment terms when email matches
payment_terms_flow.invoice_calculates_due_date: PASS - Invoice calculates due date based on payment term type
payment_terms_flow.due_on_receipt: PASS - Due date equals issue date for due_on_receipt
payment_terms_flow.30_days: PASS - Due date is 30 days after issue for Net 30 terms
payment_terms_flow.14_days: PASS - Due date is 14 days after issue for Net 14 terms
payment_terms_flow.7_days: PASS - Due date is 7 days after issue for Net 7 terms

frontend_customers_page.customer_form: PASS - Form includes payment term type dropdown (data-testid='customer-payment-term-type')
frontend_customers_page.payment_term_badges: PASS - Customer cards display payment term badges (Net 30, Net 14, etc.)

frontend_quotes_page.customer_email_lookup: PASS - Entering customer email triggers API lookup
frontend_quotes_page.payment_terms_display: PASS - Payment terms (Net 30) displayed in customer info card
frontend_quotes_page.auto_fill: PASS - Customer name, company, phone auto-filled from profile

frontend_invoices_page.page_loads: PASS - Invoices page shows invoice list with due dates
frontend_invoices_page.due_date_column: PASS - Due Date column shows calculated dates

pdf_service.payment_term_label_stored: PASS - payment_term_label stored in quote/invoice documents

existing_customer_test.john@acmecorp.tz: PASS - Existing customer has Net 30 terms as expected

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_customer_payment_terms.py - Created comprehensive tests for Customer CRUD and payment terms flow
seed_data_creation: Created 14 TEST_ prefixed customers for testing (automatically cleaned up by test teardown). Test customer john@acmecorp.tz with Net 30 terms was pre-existing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment terms feature fully functional. Customer CRUD with payment_term_type flows through to Quotes (via customer email lookup) and Invoices (with auto-calculated due dates). PDF service shows payment_term_label in documents. All payment term types tested: due_on_receipt, 7_days, 14_days, 30_days, 50_upfront_50_delivery, credit_account, custom, advance_payment.
features_verified: POST /api/admin/customers - Create customer with payment terms
POST /api/admin/quotes-v2 - Auto-apply customer payment terms to quote
POST /api/admin/invoices-v2 - Auto-calculate due date from payment terms
CustomersPage - Displays payment term badges on customer cards
QuotesPageNew - Shows customer payment terms when email matches existing customer
PDF documents include payment_term_label in header card
